name: elderly-care
title: elderly-care
description: OpenClaw-first elderly-care skill. Prefer local MCP tools, fallback to local REST API.

notes: The repo root is also a Codex plugin root so it can be installed through a repo or personal marketplace without repackaging.
The bundled marketplace entry points to `./`, which means the plugin source is this repository itself.
The packaged skill copy for the plugin lives under `skills/elderly-care/SKILL.md`.
The setup:* scripts can install the skill and write MCP config for supported clients.
The repo already ships a bundled skill-scoped upstream token, so supported clients can use the skill right after setup.
Windsurf and Trae currently install the skill and print an MCP snippet for manual paste.
Prefer ELDERLY_SKILL_ACCESS_TOKEN for this skill's upstream access instead of exposing three separate ZhiQue fields.
For Codex, the repo now also ships plugin packaging metadata so it can participate in repo-local or personal plugin marketplaces.
Use this for direct get_elderly_* tool exposure.
The startup script already reads bundled runtime config from .env.skill and optional local overrides from .env.local.
Use this when MCP has not been connected yet.
REST fallback depends on the client environment being allowed to make local HTTP requests.
The local API token is scoped to this skill's own REST fallback.
The startup script already reads bundled runtime config from .env.skill and optional local overrides from .env.local.
